author: Amit Puri
review: It's casual & comfy. Food is easy on the eyes & delicious. They have plenty of brews & wine options. Indoor/Outdoor seating options & parking was easy.

author: sudo science
review: I would go as far to say its my favorite pizza in Bellingham. My thin crust, fold your pizza loversthis is for you! The giant cookies at the counter are also delicious. They have a variety of other items as well. They host many events

author: Tanner Hinrichs
review: Amazing food, and beer selection! I love hanging out here!

author: Jorden Rosa
review: What a little gem this place is. Cant believe its taken us this long to get here. DELICIOUS breakfast and coffee. Good service. Cant wait to try dinner. Well be back.

author: Max Charp
review: Amazing beer selection in cans/bottles and on draught. But the vibe was so weird on saturday night. There was live music, nobody was talking, not much people drinking the great beers. It felt like it was a private event and you weren't allowed to make any noise. I guess I'll only visit this place as a beer shop for to go beers

author: Sarah Daniels
review: Really delicious food in a super chill and welcoming atmosphere. The person behind the counter was really kind and friendly and our food came out in good time. Definitely order the sweet potato rounds, they're worth it!

author: Megan Forster
review: Arguably one of the best (if not THE best) restaurants in Bellingham. Everything on their menu slaps. Bfast. Lunch. Dinner. Diverse menu with incredible flavor and a neighborhood coffee shop vibe. Locals know!!

author: Brad Harvey
review: Pizza is exceptional on top of a great on tap beer selection. I dont recall the name of the pizza, but it had pesto, tomatoes, roasted garlic, smoked salmon and goat cheese. It absolutely blew my mind and exceeded any expectation I had.

ownerResponse.text: Sounds like you enjoyed the Crispy's Northwest! We are so glad you enjoyed your experience at Greene's. Thanks so much!

author: Woody DuBois
review: Greenies has become a go to for us. The food is very good and the atmosphere is chill. They offer a wide variety of thingshamburgers, burritos, salads etc. The also have a great beer selection.

author: Sharon quinn-sears
review: We love eating at Greenes corner but this review is for the Turkish dinner that was done by a guest chef. The venue was great and the staff were great. The wine course for 50$ was great. The food wasnt good.

author: Molly Garrison
review: Irish music every Monday night! Great staff, great food, great beer, great music! Lots of types of seating inside and out. I go pretty much every week and I love every minute. I recommend the daily Special Slice.

author: Mike Hatch
review: Local musicians were there playing some Folk and Irish music.  It was great to share a meal while watching and listening.  Great ambiance, food, and decent selection of beverages makes this place awesome.

author: Hannah Bailey
review: Best pizza in town. Hidden gem on the breakfast menu: Huevos rancheros. So good!

author: Gene M
review: Somewhat cozy atmosphere but menu is overpriced for what we got. Food was ok but underwhelming, especially considering cost and wait. The sandwich pictured was $15, when I could go to other spots for better versions for nearly half that!

ownerResponse.text: Not everyone enjoys our beer service and general style, so we're sorry it wasn't to your taste. We sincerely apologize if one of our staff was unusually slow with your order!

author: Connor Vest
review: This is a nice looking place on the corner. And it has comfy outdoor seating to accommodate COVID restrictions. They have a great selection of beer, wine, and ciders. We got their Prociutto  Chicken pizza when we went and it was AMAZING. This is some of the best pizza I've ever had outside of Italy. You have to try it.

author: Alayna Bricco
review: I had a beef teriyaki sandwich and it was amazing! A bit messy, so get extra napkins. They have a fabulous kids corner and the service was fast and friendly!

author: Ryan Salas-Mitchell
review: This is a cool place to meet up and hang out, then bring a pizza home. It's a bit pricey for what you get. But it's independently owned and operated.  A nice addition to Bellingham.

author: Tom McNutt
review: Greene's offers a large variety of beers, ciders, and kombucha along with an interesting assortment of food options. Always at least one vegan option and an ever changing menu.

author: Wendell Bryant
review:
Very friendly staff
Open airy atmosphere.
Huge beer selection

author: Bonnie Wong
review:
The service was really good and my family really liked their food.

We ordered fish and chips and a side of raw oysters. The side of oysters was $7

author: Chef Menajem Peretz
review: Very out of the ordinary place, service was great, the decor very unique and the food great.

author: Wayne Fornalski
review: Delicious offerings and calm atmosphere hiding behind an outside seating area and green awning that keep this gem discreet.

author: Bob Davis
review: Wander Heff. among many beers on tap. Food fresh, casual atmosphere, good service. Another visit: quesadia and Boundary Bay Irish Red.

author: Samantha Roeder
review: Great menu for such a little joint. Excellent beer and wine selection, to go as well.

author: Tina Shelton
review: This place is wonderful. The food ranges from burgers to pizza to sandwiches, but this is deceptive. The food is prepared with thought and skill and creativity. What seems simple is elevated to top form. Burgers are juicy, fries are all potato, everything is fresh. It's a definite go to for delicious casual.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much Tina! It means the world to us to have our hard work and love for good food appreciated.

author: Georgia Allen
review: First time here. Came to listen to amazing musicians Lits of casual seating and food and drink options.

author: Becky Holston
review: Cute little place with a welcoming environment. We went to hear live music and the setup was great. The lights were brighter than I expected, but they weren't bright, just not dim-ish like places similar to this seem to be.

author: Macy Chillingworth
review: Love the selection of beer and food, and the casual atmosphere! Every food item (that I've had) they make is delicious, you seriously can't go wrong with any of it! If you like super flavorful "fusion" food, anything you order off of their

author: Ben Winarske
review: Went here on a Saturday afternoon, had a fantastic lunch! Got the Chicken and Waffles, the chicken was seasoned well and was not greasy, the waffle were very fluffy, and the sausage gravy tasted amazing. My girlfriend got the Fish and

author: Connie Thowson
review: Great tasting food and lots of beers on tap and also large selection of beers and wines in coolers. Pet and kid friendly.  Not cheap though.

author: Taylor Ewing
review: Great employees and locations. They have plenty of local selections and make really great pizza.

author: Mike Williams
review: Loved the Cubano and they have a great beer selection. Interior is pretty sparse, but the fireplace and friendly staff more than make up for it.

author: Mindless Films
review: Best kimchi in Bellingham hands down! Went in for a quick bite to eat, and was very satisfied with my meal

author: Ray Rhein
review: Went in today took the recommendation of the hostess for chicken and waffles. Didnt know it came with the onion gravy. It was gross. Didnt eat it. Wasnt even offered a refund. Hostess hid the whole time I was there.  Terrible service. You guys usually have good food.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Ray, thanks for the feedback. We apologize that you did not enjoy your experience at Greenes. Our menu indicates that the chicken & waffles is served with our scratch made sausage gravy (we do not serve onion gravy at Greenes) and it is served as described unless otherwise requested. Typically we do not issue refunds unless a dish is served incorrectly. We hope you understand. Thank you!

author: Mike Everroad
review:
One of Bellingham's best places to grab delicious food and a pint (available but not essential).
They are the epitome of Bellingham culture. They have wonderful coffee, occasional live music and one of the most original and delicious menus around.

author: Michael Oneill
review: I went in one night and had a breakfast dinner (biscuits and gravy) and my wife had a Taco salad. We enjoyed it.

author: Ryan Fitzgerald
review: Great food, nice and open dining room, tons of rotating taps

author: Tc
review: My daughter and I have been going here for years, we always have a chill fun experience and we leave happy.  Wide variety of meal options and even more beer options to stay or go! Food is always fresh and delicious.  Love the live music days.  Staff always super friendly:)

author: Kathryn DeWoody
review: Gimme a break!?  15 minutes for an order of fries?!  If a burger I'd still be here next week!

author: Sam Fulton
review: Trendy spot with good food. Need to get their BLM sign in storage. It's reminiscent of people who drive around in their cars with FOP (Frarernal Order of Police) emblems on their bumpers or rear passenger window as a wink that "we're together " and hassle somebody else.

author: M C
review: Nice little local shop.  I ordered the nachos and was underwhelmed.  Not loaded with cheese, and only a dozen olive slices or so. The pork was pretty good, but Lacking in quantity as well. A lot of naked chips to be had, which IMHO, makes

author: Arthur Brault
review: Great selection of local and regional beer, wonderful pizza, sandwiches,and appetizers

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for the great review, Arthur! We appreciate your support.

author: david Henderson
review: We love George and Amy at the bar. Try the Amy's special loco Moco. With pork instead of burger. A&a has excellent food, vibe, service, and prices are reasonable.

author: Morgan Rosin
review: So good! Prices are great and the food is fantastic. Highly highly recommend coming here. Also they have just about every type of beer available and a huge draft list.

author: Ian Howard
review: First time in. I had some very good blackened fish tacos. Was amazed to see Fremont Brew 3000, a world class beer, on tap. And it turns out they've got a ton of great bottled beer. I'll be coming back often.

author: Bret Garrett
review: This place has amazing sandwiches. Dont sleep on them.  I make a point to stop here whenever Im going through Bellingham. The menu seems to be pretty pricey. For example, I spent twenty six dollars on a lunch(sandwich, fries, drink) but it was delicious and the food was clear high quality and made fresh for my order.

author: Julie Holman
review: The food was excellent; the choice of drinks overwhelming so many....

author: Annie Robershaw
review: First time in today and we loved our meals! We had the Bleu Burger and the pork Bahn Mi, both were remarkably delicious. Huge, impressive selection of drinks. Excited to return to try more options.

author: Nicole Bishopp
review: Food was overpriced in my opinion for the quality.  I had the club which had so much lettuce on it I could make a medium salad with it. Barely any tomatoes and the gluten free bun was rock hard on the outside and crumbly/dry on the inside.  Not worth $16.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Nicole, we are sorry to hear you did not enjoy your experience at Greene's. We are known for packing our sandwiches with fresh, organic spring mix; but we are happy to modify at customers request. As for the bun, that is highly unusual as we use fresh GF buns from Avenue Bread. We'd love for you to come in and give us a chance to make it right. Thanks for taking the time to leave us a review, and Happy Holidays to you.

author: Haley Humphrey
review: I love how they make sure youre pizza is always ready when you are, lance and Kristine are seriously the best. Service is great food is great not to mention REAL. Beer selection is and has always been amazing. The food looks more like an

ownerResponse.text: Thanks a lot! We appreciate your business and look forward to seeing you again!

author: Bridget Galati
review: Visited for the first time last night for dinner -- what took us so long?! Great food, amazing playlist, cold delicious beer, and lots of fun books for the kids. Very friendly staff, too. We will definitely be back!

author: Samantha Roeder
review: For outdoor dining, this place is great! they installed picnic tables with tabletop gas firepits on each table.  Great pizza and beer selections, as well as a basic menu. Not a TON for vegetarian fare, but some good ones. My favorite is the

author: Rose Achey
review: Amazing little place to get a bite of Bellingham. Eclectic menu but with plenty of staples, all a delicious selection. Several vegetarian options. Quick service. A good place to eat even if you only have about 30-45min as service is quick. Indoor and outdoor seating available.

author: Shannon McLean
review: Fireside dining at the tables outside and picnic tables on the lawn. Great food made fresh with entree's you wouldn't expect. Not a huge selection of food items but there is a huge selection of beverage's. Friendly staff reasonable prices.

author: Scott Mauermann
review: They should take a hard look at their policy on what bottled beers they will sell on site and the associated rules for consumtion if over a certain ABV. They quality ofservice and aptitudes was sadly lacking.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Scott! We are hoping you could give us a call to further explain your experience and help us understand what led you to write this review. Thank you.

author: Jordan Bridges
review: One of the Best spots in town. They have done an AMAZING job at really adapting to the pandemic! There outside tables are so comfy and super warm! Many of the waitresses including Kimmerlyn and Tanya are so sweet, always going above and

author: T McNutt
review: Greene's has done a great job of providing a huge variety of canned and bottled beverages, a dozen or more draft beer or cider options, a variety of food, and very hip staff. They also have created a fun "protected" environment, including

author: Stone Jones
review: The Cubano and Pesto Turkey sandwiches are to die for! Incredibly diverse beer selection. Great service with many smiles. Really good live music! The only drawback for me is due to my diabetes. I would like a larger choice of sugar-free beverages.

author: Tint Lady Window Tinting and More
review: We were able to reserve space for our annual Christmas party here. As well as pre order our choices for dinner (there were 30 of us). The food came out on time and they even played Christmas music for us. No time limit like other venues.

author: Marissa Morse
review: My son loved the burger he had, and I had a chicken sandwich that was pretty good. My boyfriend got the fried oysters you could tell they were frozen and got soggy, he couldn't finish them.

author: Jay C
review:
Great food and service. Nice clean dining room, following Covid rules.
Food was perfect! I normally have a hard time finding breakfast places that I like everything on my plate but they did it just right.

author: Alex Johnson
review: The pizza is amazing! And Live Irish music on Mondays is one of outlets families favorite things to do!

author: M C
review: My favorite place in town, great food, calm atmosphere and friendly service.

author: Hugh Newmark
review: Wife and I tried this place for the first time today, we were thoroughly impressed! My wife had the chicken and waffles, definitely the best in Bellingham.

author: TheButterflysunset
review: They make a great Reuben with homemade kraut. Also a great selection of beer and good atmosphere. You can dine inside at socially distanced tables, or outside at two different locations.

author: Phil Rose
review: I used to really not like this place but it has grown on me. I wish they would do something about the lighting though. Make it more snug inside.

author: Matt Campbell
review: Not a bad place, but my credit card was charged twice. I understand merchant services and my bank have some sort of issues with crediting me my money back, but it has been 5 weeks and no refund yet. Very frustrating, and I will not be

author: Daniel Clayton
review: In the past I have had good food here, but tonight was a joke. The cook kept looking at us through the window like we killed his dog. We ordered to go and as soon as we get home I open my order of "chicken" and waffles only to find overly

author: Eric Veal
review: Nice place. Liked my French dip but found the service to be a bit slow.

author: Bee Fletcher
review: Fantastic vegetarian breakfast burrito. The pico de gallo and house guacamole make this Bellingham favorite extra special. Cant wait for summer evenings outside to try a pizza with a cold one from their massive collection!

author: Piper McCarthy
review: Orders tend to be wrong (meat types, additions, and substitutions) and food is commonly cold. Its super unfortunate as weve really wanted to enjoy this neighborhood spot - would not recommend.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Elias, we are sorry to hear that you did not enjoy your experience and Greene's. It is incredibly uncommon for us to hear these types of complaints, so we hope that you give us another try, as this is not how we are used to having our food described. Take care, and Happy Holidays.

author: Scott Sheehan
review: Excellent service and amazing food I was so impressed with the different options but a great environment really well done definitely a five-star restaurant and beer hall

author: Ken Scott
review: Amazing Club sandwich, can tell everything was fresh and prepared with care. Only complaint is it was a little on the pricy side. For $13+ I expect a side of chips or something. Regardless I was impressed. Will be back.

author: Mando Surita III
review: FABULOUS!!! The food was still super hot even with delivery!! The fish was delicious!  A+ on price, speed of service, taste, appearance, and customer service. Cant wait to be able to eat there in person!

author: Landi Tillis
review: Honestly their food is delicious but being from the food industry I cannot will not spend money with such rude management. I went there to get our favorite tacos and was asking about how much the guacamole was. I was originally told it was

author: Jerad Trannum
review: The option to order out is great for work lunches. The size and quality of their sandwiches are top notch, from the bread to the cuts of meat and greens. The side salads are also made up of a great selection of mixed greens.

author: Scott Hansen
review:
This is the only pizza sauce in bellingham with herbs in it. If youre spending money on other pizza in this town consider it a waste
Pleasantly Surprised.

ownerResponse.text: Thank You! We try our best! Cheers!

author: Rochelle Sears
review: I live a couple blocks away from Greene's Corner and since they are a neighborhood business I want to support them, but I feel like I have given them more than enough chances.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for the feedback; it will help us improve for the future. We hope you'll give us another chance.

author: Nathan Butcher (chutterhanban)
review: This place is waaaayyy better than other "convenience stores." Great food and great beer selection. Fun to be at, too. Seating varies from picnic tables to regular tables to "couch style" areas.

author: Alexis Newmark
review: This is my new favorite place in Bellingham. It's just cool. There are so many drinks, and the food is amazing! Thanks, Jackie, for recommending the chicken and waffles!

author: Dean Prather
review: Excellent service, food, beer. All good. Vegan chili is delish and the Homer Greek pizza is also very good. Live the Caesar salad too.

author: Ian Beatty
review: The only thing worse than the terrible live music and trivia is the food. The food looks like it was made by a 10 year old. I order a quesadilla and it was cheese between two pita flatbreads. Not to mention the cost, the prices are so ridiculous. DO NOT COME, I REPEAT DO NOT COME.

ownerResponse.text: Sorry you didn't win Trivia

author: Allan Redstone
review: Quite simply the best pizza and sandwiches in Bellingham.  Great selection of craft beer and cider as well.  I am so happy they moved to James Street!

author: Adelaide Haddock
review: I got the chicken and waffles, and it was scrumptious. They have comfortable seating both inside and outside. Ill definitely be returning

author: Cheyenne Hoza
review: The Cubano, the Korean fried chicken slider, and the East Indie slider were absolutely scrumptious!!

author: Alex Bransky
review: The pizza wasn't as good as it looked but the rest of the food was fantastic and so was the service.

author: Shane O'Berry
review: Easily the worst ceaser salad Ive ever spent $10 on. Just lettuce, dressing, and a huge disappointment. The BBQ chicken pizza sucked too. Definitely wont be going back.

author: Mahsa
review: Probably one of the tastiest sandwhich I've had in a long time. The bread was amazing, the greens were fresh and the combo was so good. I tried the Pesto Turkey. And very friendly service.

ownerResponse.text: We're so glad you enjoyed your meal and hope to see you again next time you're in town. Hearing that our food was delicious is what keeps us doing what we do!

author: blaisess
review: This place is the best! Im from Seattle and miss the amazing tap room at chucks hop shop so this filled that role perfectly! Great service great food

author: Mason May
review: Fantastic food, dynamic drinks, and awesome atmosphere! Def check this place out if you haven't been here.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for your review! We look forward to having you back.

author: Dennis Grayer
review: Excellent pizza!  I group them with the top pizza restaurants in Bellingham.   Highly recommend the Turkey Club from their sandwich menu!  Kudos for having Kombucha on tap!

author: hansen370
review: Excellent food with great service! They have reasonably cheap in house delivery and they came out to Lake Samish.  They even have breakfast. What more do you want? Order in house or have them deliver.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the kind words! We're glad we were able to take care of your delivery needs!

author: Jeanne McGee
review: They've kept the good vibe going.  I especially love the poetry music night on Wednesdays.  Incredible selection of wines and beers.

author: Andrew Johnson
review: I love the people. I love the sound of everyone enjoying themselves. Fun. Peaceful. Family.

author: David Sanchez
review: The CLUB sandwich is a must try. Very delicious freshly made. The staff are nice and friendly. Cheese pizza is also very good.

author: Daniel Gallegos
review: I have ordered take out twice in as many weeks. Once for breakfast, and once for a burger.  Excellent food and friendly staff!  I will be back.

author: Joshua Hatfield
review: Great food, great atmosphere.   If your in Bellingham and hungry give it a try.

author: Nonnie James
review: SUPER GOOD food, service was nice. There was a covered area to eat that had a nice propane heater to enjoy while you eat. Great selection on beers.

author: Chris Wells
review: I tried the grilled tempeh.  Not the best.  But my friends burger and chicken sandwich looked good.  Food took a rather long time.

author: Summer Holeman
review: Delicious food and great beverage options! Lots of seating options-inside, outside heated covered area and picnic tables on grass.

author: jeff klotz
review: It's a nice community place for food and a great selection of beers on the border of Sunnyland in Bellingham. They usually have something going on every night from music to poetry and trivia.

author: Robert Knode
review: Great pizza, sandwiches and selection of beer and wine at great prices.

author: Lorea Hokanson
review: Always have a great experience at greenes corner. Their staff is friendly and the food is amazing.  Check out their music,  painting,  trivia and game nights. So many amazing things to do here.

author: Carole Hanaway
review: Best live music on the weekends.  Yummy soups and expensive beer and wine coolers...

author: hapes jr
review: Pricey like most of these new hip joints in Bellingham. Very homey and one of the most family friendly. Not too crowded. Food is aight.

author: Cindy Lou Martin
review: Food was good but expensive! Heath dept. needs to get on them about allowing dogs inside their establishment. It was not a working service dog, as it barked and was going up to people to be petted.

author: Jeff Klam
review: Phenom.....i....nal..... will head here again. Good sized portions and the food was so goood.

author: anna heckman
review: Great atmosphere, amazing beer and wine selection.. Staff was working their butts off to keep us well fed.

author: Erik Gomez
review: Great atmosphere, beer selection, and friendly staff. Mediocre food at fairly expensive prices though. Nearly $20 for a personal pizza........

author: Sarah Luna
review: I've eaten here a couple times and the food was fine but kinda bland and boring. You can tell they use fresh ingredients though.

author: Eliza Keller
review: Other than the loud traffic noise it was a good place with nummy pizza.if you like thick crust pizza you might still like theirs,but it is a thin crust. They are moving to a new location in bellingham soon

author: Melanie Cadwallader
review: Great atmosphere. Very friendly waitresses and cooks. Love the draft kombucha choices and the burritos.

author: David Palmer
review: Love this place! The food is fantastic! Their special slice is creative and never disappoints!

author: Jon Schmitz
review: Friendly and funky cafe/beer store with books and some toys for kids.  Very chill staff and good food and drink.  Worth checking out.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for coming in and keeping it Greene :) Looking forward to next time!

author: Soliam Mercury
review: My favorite place to get food in Bellingham! The atmosphere and dine-in experience are great. The staff are incredibly nice and the food is fantastic :)

author: Sadie Klingman
review: Best thin crust pizza I've EVER HAD. I took a painting class here once; it has a relaxing atmosphere with friendly staff!

author: Forrest Allison
review: The food is outstanding, it has lunch and dinner till late, and it's not expensive at all!  Really, the food is unbelievably good.  Eat here, try it

ownerResponse.text: We're glad to hear you love our fresh, scratch-made food. Thanks for the stars!

author: matthew palmer
review: Taco salad was Hella nice. Might need Sriracha as the flavor is mild for most.

author: Charles Wiseman
review: Great food, live music, plenty of parking around

author: Benza Maman
review: The food was bomb! And the server was super nice, great music, great vibes, and did I mention DOGGOS!

author: Patrick Baumann
review: We like this place. Great tacos, interesting specials, and an awesome beer selection.

author: Dybbuk Klezmer
review: Pretty good sandwiches and hosts lots of great music.

author: Abigail Salinger
review: Great food, fun atmosphere, and an awesome and unusual selection of beers. Always worth a visit!

author: Greg
review: Great mix of food!

author: Steven Yeats
review: Amazing service and great workers. The cashier was super knowledgeable and friendly.  I will definitely be visiting here again before I leave the area.

author: keith karling
review: Great food, great atmosphere, huge variety of beer. Best of all is that they have a parking lot.

author: Bob T
review: Friendly staff and great food!! Well worth the visit...

author: Dangergirl B (Dangergirl)
review: If the Beef Stroganoff is on the soup menu. Order it. Amazing!

author: Jason Vaughan
review: Great little place with a funky vibe. Food was excellent.  Next time we come we will bring the kids.

author: Mychal Farley
review: Great place to go, for a wide variety of beer and food. Fun inviting environment with great service full of smiles!

author: Todd Schwiesow
review: I think it's pretty average... Nothing special... But it does have a good selection of beer and the food is decent...

author: Jeremy Ewing
review: First time and many more times to come. I had the chicken bacon ranch wrap, it was delightfully delicious

author: Alexis France Staley
review: First visit. Had Philly Steak. Meat was pretty bad. Very disappointed for taste and price.

author: Malachi Dunham
review: Great place...has a fair amount of room. Can get a little loud at times. Has a wide selection of beers.

author: Lori Nichols
review: Awesome flavors as always...had a lovely bowl of chicken pho.  These guys rock!

author: Shnuzel S
review: Probably a hundred drink choices including local and specialty alcoholic beverages. Delicious tacos, desserts, sandwiches, and more!

author: Andrew Hovenden
review: Great fish and chips and wow the fried pickles! Will be back.

author: TC Anderson
review: they serve breakfast all day which is awesomeness. also massive and great beer selection.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you! We look forward to serving you again soon.

author: Barney Smith
review: Great food! Awesome staff! I'm not sure but you get good karma from from being in these confines.

author: Riley Wilson
review: Had a really good bacon wrapped, hot dog that was delicious. Return trip in the future

author: Rowena Cantrell
review: I ordered the Greene's burger. It was of the best burgers ever.

author: Janne Sleeper
review: Enormous beer selection, bottled and on tap. Adventurous and excellent food options.

author: Ty Jorgensen
review: A local favorite. Huge selection of beer. Great food.

author: Amy Bice
review: Nice staff and a great beer options! Food is pretty good too.

author: KennyB_ MTB
review: Great food, great beers, and awesome employees what more could you ask for

author: Alexarc Mastema
review: Huge beer (can/bottle) selection and a large number of taps. The food is damn tasty!

author: James Lopez
review: Great place for a beer and food. Nice people and great service. Hard to find in b ham

author: Allen Oleksak
review: One of my favorites in town.  Great vibes and great food.

author: Ross Felton
review: The BEST CLAM CHOWDER I have ever had.  Good service Great food. I highly recommend this place.

author: Mike L
review: Great food and support local musicians too!

author: Russ Robinson
review: Miss them being out on Northwest, but the pizza is still hot and the beer still cold. Great place.

author: Kyle Weiss
review: Had the Turkey Bacon Wrap. It was excellent. We will definitely be back!

author: Carson Christensen
review: The food they make there is good but over price  alike 4$ for a slice of pizza but everything is good

author: Joseph Lehmann
review: Cubano in the sunshine with a cold drink. Why wouldn't you want this?

author: S Warner
review: The beer selection is great, the staff is friendly and Trivia Night is fun!

author: Lucky's Speed Shop
review: Mmmmmm, best cheese pizza around. And beer selection is unbelievable . Check this hole in the wall out.

author: Renata Reitz
review: Great food,  and dog friendly!

author: michael daigneault
review: My new favorite restaurant. Never knew it was there will be back again and again.

author: Carl Graber
review: Excellent place to eat

author: Hayley
review: Great spot and drink selection

author: beendee b
review: Cozy, warm, inviting.  Food was excellent...beer selection is over the top

author: Dawn Walker
review: So hit and miss on the service. The food is great and atmosphere is calm.

ownerResponse.text: We're sorry that you have sometimes had a less than stellar experience with us. We'd like a chance to make things right so please try us again!

author: louis jeen
review: although food was bit expensive but the quality was outstanding!!! will definitely come again!!!

author: Jeannine Harber
review: E excellent service great atmosphere wonderful food and a fantastic choice of beers.

author: tom weeks
review: Great beer selection and great food and great music and great servers!

ownerResponse.text: Glad you're loving Greene's Corner - we're lucky to have you as a customer!

author: Mitch Nolze
review: Not a lot of experience with this place, but good sandwiches and Carne Wrap. Will come back when I'm in the area.

author: Carol Hamre

review: Way over priced, horrible customer service. Do not go here! Go support a local business that is actually worth supporting.

ownerResponse.text: We feel that our prices compare favorably to other restaurants in Bellingham serving genuinely scratch-made, high quality food. Sorry that you had a bad experience - in the future if one of our staff isn't providing excellent service, please feel free to let us know so we can make it better for everyone!

author: Milangela Diaz
review: The restaurant needs ventilation. While you eat in the place, the air you breathe is heavy... all the grease from the kitchen mixes in the environment and many customers find it difficult to breathe comfortably... it is not comfortable to s

ownerResponse.text:
Hello Milangela,

Thanks so much for taking the time to write us a review. We are so happy you enjoyed the food! As for the ventilation, we have a large industrial hood vent that sits above our fryers and grills. We also installed two large ceiling fans about 6 months ago in the dining room. During the summer months, we keep our front and back doors open during the day to have a steady flow of air throughout the restaurant. Unfortunately, in the winter time, we have to close our doors to ensure the heat does not escape and our customers stay warm. Fortunately, we do offer seating on our covered and heated patio. We recommend taking advantage of this area if sitting inside is bothersome for you. Thanks again, and take care!

-Greene's Management
